about.title: About Me
about.paragraph1: I'm a Web Developer with over 3 years of experience building complete solutions, from robust APIs to modern, responsive interfaces.
about.paragraph2: I work with PHP, TypeScript, Java, Spring Boot and React. I'm currently deepening my knowledge in Cybersecurity and Machine Learning.
about.deliver3: Interfaces focused on usability and performance
